title: Nursery Rhyme. XCVI. Proverbs.
content:
Needles and pins, needles and pins,
        When a man marries his trouble begins.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. XCVI. Proverbs.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
